title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Oden, Unknown person #2, Toki, Kinemon, Unknown person #3 as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Witching hour-san, I got some money, so.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're pushing yourself again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will scatter them in ebisu town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please carry some blood in your Kimono every day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi has completely fallen in love with you,

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Not knowing that you're Lord Oden's daughter....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It must be hard for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone remember

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If something happens we'll separate "Komurasaki" from Orochi with "death".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just a little longer, it'll be fine...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just a little longer till...20 years!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A few months earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're here! The spirits are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They really came back!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Toki's power was very real!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kinemon, Kanjuro, Raiza, Kikunjo, Mommonosuke...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those s...!!! they time-traveled here from that day 20 years ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does an ability like that really exist? They came from that burning castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe someone is just messing with you cause you're scared?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about this!!! Look at it, this letter!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Continue to keep watch at the coast!!! There should be some fellows entering this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes sir!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they are actually alive, then I have something that I have wanted to ask the remnants of the Kozuki for the last 20 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This guy can be trusted,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He was born in a public theater...........

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And lost his parents on stage due to Wano Country's persecution!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's the clan who killed the Daimyos!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who only knows the way to live on stage,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: completely lost his heart,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and lives on acting as someone else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are the Descendant of the Head Kurozumi family?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, and I got rid of the people who killed your parents...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: kyokyo Kyo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's only the prologue of this story of revenge!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You'll live as a real "Kozuki"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and died as one,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Without anyone noticing it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the important role that's given to you on this grand stage!! Can you do it...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been looking a place to die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm honored,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To completely become something in it's entirety, that is his only source of pleasure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everytime I went to Oden's Castle to Borrow Money...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I took double the amount of money I needed from his safe and was only able to be able to join ands with you precisely because I had those funds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To be hands will become

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The information you got on Oden's raid I'm sure,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Was also useful to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The peak of the man's insanity came after that, when he legitimately intended to die along with open and the others during the execution.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has no emotions and before I stopped him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He genuinely lived as one of Oden's vassals.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing he did was to slowly but surely feed me information,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He did it with such devotion,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: that it was creepy.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
